content.speakerText: Hi Sarah, hope you're doing well!
content.speakerTextCn: 嗨，莎拉，希望你最近不错！
expectedAnswers: I'm good, thanks! I've got a few questions about expense reimbursement.
Doing great! Could you help me with my trip expenses?
Not bad—just wanted to check in about submitting my receipts this week.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否明确提出报销咨询
语言准确性：语法和用词是否正确
表达自然度：是否符合职场轻松但专业的语气

content.speakerText: Good morning, Mr. Chen. How are you today?
content.speakerTextCn: 早上好，陈先生，今天怎么样？
expectedAnswers: I'm well, thank you. I’m preparing my quarterly expense reports and have a couple of questions.
Pretty good! I need to get my travel claims processed before Friday.
Fine, thanks. Could you advise on the policy for meal reimbursements?
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否自然引入报销主题
语言准确性：使用了正确的动词和名词搭配
表达自然度：语气礼貌、符合职场语境，避免过于随意或生硬
